column1: Mood: How would you describe your mood over the past two weeks?
column2: Anxious Social Scale: On a scale of 1-10, how often have you felt anxious in social situations recently?
column3: Anxiety Triggers: Have you experienced any of the following anxiety triggers in the past month?
column4: Sleep Quality: How would you rate the quality of your sleep over the past week?
column5: Appetite Change: Have you noticed any significant changes in your appetite?
column6: Lack of Interest: How often have you felt a lack of interest or pleasure in daily activities?
column7: Enjoyable Activities: How often do you engage in activities you enjoy or that help you relax?
column8: Physical Anxiety Symptoms: Have you had any physical symptoms of anxiety (e.g., heart palpitations, sweating, shortness of breath)?
column9: Concentration Difficulty: How often do you find it difficult to concentrate on tasks?
column10: Coping Strategies: What coping strategies have you used when feeling stressed or anxious?
